section_miscategorizations.text: He describes difficulty swallowing and reports swollen tonsils.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is patient-reported symptomatology rather than clinician-observed findings or documented exam.

section_miscategorizations.text: He drinks primarily water, occasionally consuming wine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is history/social history information reported by the patient, not a diagnostic assessment or problem synthesis.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient also reports a stuffy nose.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an additional patient-reported symptom, not a treatment plan, order, or follow-up action.
